exercises.instructions_en: Complete the information question with the correct auxiliary.

item.question: On the call, you ask the client: 'How much ______ the autumn campaign cost?' (future)
item.correct_answer: will
accepted_answers: will
item.explanation_ar: سؤال معلومة عن المستقبل ← أداة الاستفهام + will + الفاعل + الفعل المجرّد.

exercises.instructions_en: Complete the yes/no question with the correct auxiliary.

item.question: ______ the client want to see the softer version too? (present)
item.correct_answer: Does
accepted_answers: Does
does
item.explanation_ar: الفاعل مفرد (the client) ← Does، وبعدها الفعل يرجع مجرّد (want).

exercises.instructions_en: Complete the polite-disagreement phrase.

item.question: That's a fair point, ______ our research shows bold ideas perform well. (polite contrast)
item.correct_answer: but
accepted_answers: but
however
item.explanation_ar: تعترفين بوجهة نظره أول، بعدين تخالفينه بلطف ← but (تناقض مهذّب).

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option to form the negative question.

item.question: The client pushes back: '______ the bright colors hurt our brand image?'
item.correct_answer: Won't
accepted_answers: Won't
item.explanation_ar: سؤال سالب للاعتراض ← Won't + الفاعل + الفعل. «Don't will» فيها أداتان، و«Will not the» ترتيبها غلط.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: I see what you mean; ______, these colors still follow the brand guidelines.
item.correct_answer: however
accepted_answers: however
item.explanation_ar: علاقة تناقض مهذّب ← however. therefore نتيجة، moreover إضافة، because سبب.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite the blunt reply as a polite disagreement.

item.question: Rewrite this reply to disagree politely: 'No, you're wrong. The concept is not too bold.'
item.correct_answer: That's a fair point, but the concept is not too bold for our audience.
accepted_answers: That's a fair point, but the concept is not too bold for our audience.
I see what you mean, however the concept is not too bold for our audience.
I understand your concern, but the concept is not too bold for our audience.
item.explanation_ar: بدل الرفض المباشر: اعترفي (That's a fair point) ثم خالفي بلطف بـ but.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite as a polite question that offers an alternative.

item.question: Rewrite as a polite alternative offer (a question): (we / deliver / the first phase / in two weeks)
item.correct_answer: What if we delivered the first phase in two weeks?
accepted_answers: What if we delivered the first phase in two weeks?
Could we deliver the first phase in two weeks?
Would it help if we delivered the first phase in two weeks?
item.explanation_ar: طرح بديل بلطف ← What if + الفاعل + الفعل بالماضي (delivered).

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'How much this proposal will cost?'
item.correct_answer: How much will this proposal cost?
accepted_answers: How much will this proposal cost?
item.explanation_ar: سؤال معلومة: أداة الاستفهام + will + الفاعل + الفعل، مو ترتيب الجملة الخبرية.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'I understand your concern, moreover a rushed timeline could affect the quality.'
item.correct_answer: I understand your concern, however a rushed timeline could affect the quality.
accepted_answers: I understand your concern, however a rushed timeline could affect the quality.
I understand your concern, but a rushed timeline could affect the quality.
item.explanation_ar: العلاقة تناقض مو إضافة ← however/but، مو moreover.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the words in the correct order.

item.question: Put the words in order: showed / if / help / Would / two / you / it / examples / I
item.correct_answer: Would it help if I showed you two examples?
accepted_answers: Would it help if I showed you two examples?
item.explanation_ar: عرض حل بلطف على شكل سؤال ← Would it help if + الفاعل + الفعل بالماضي (showed).

exercises.instructions_en: Complete the ordering linking word.

item.question: Firstly, our team will prepare the concept. ______, we will share a detailed proposal. (ordering)
item.correct_answer: Secondly
accepted_answers: Secondly
item.explanation_ar: بعد Firstly تجي النقطة الثانية بالترتيب ← Secondly.

exercises.instructions_en: Complete the addition linking word.

item.question: In addition, we will suggest three influencers. ______, we will share the budget. (addition)
item.correct_answer: Moreover
accepted_answers: Moreover
item.explanation_ar: إضافة نقطة جديدة للنقاط السابقة ← Moreover.

exercises.instructions_en: Complete the phrase in a formal register (no contraction).

item.question: Please ______ hesitate to contact me. (formal — no contraction)
item.correct_answer: do not
accepted_answers: do not
item.explanation_ar: الإيميل الرسمي بدون اختصار ← do not، مو don't.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: ______ the campaign runs for six weeks, we will send a weekly report.
item.correct_answer: Although
accepted_answers: Although
item.explanation_ar: علاقة تناقض في بداية الجملة ← Although. Moreover إضافة و Therefore نتيجة.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: We will send weekly reports ______ you can follow the progress.
item.correct_answer: so that
accepted_answers: so that
item.explanation_ar: علاقة غرض (عشان) ← so that. therefore نتيجة، مو غرض.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite in a formal register with no contractions.

item.question: Rewrite in a formal register (no contractions): 'Thanks! Don't hesitate to contact me.'
item.correct_answer: Thank you. Please do not hesitate to contact me.
accepted_answers: Thank you. Please do not hesitate to contact me.
Thank you. Do not hesitate to contact me.
item.explanation_ar: أسلوب رسمي: Thanks تصير Thank you، و Don't تصير do not.

exercises.instructions_en: Join the two sentences with a linking word that shows contrast.
exercises.instructions_ar: اربطي الجملتين بكلمة تدل على التناقض

item.question: Join into one sentence showing contrast: 'The campaign runs for six weeks. We will send a report every week.'
item.correct_answer: Although the campaign runs for six weeks, we will send a report every week.
accepted_answers: Although the campaign runs for six weeks, we will send a report every week.
The campaign runs for six weeks, but we will send a report every week.
item.explanation_ar: علاقة تناقض ← Although + الجملة الأولى، فاصلة، ثم الجملة الثانية.
item.instruction_ar: اربطي الجملتين بكلمة تدل على التناقض

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'The results were strong, moreover we launched a second phase.'
item.correct_answer: The results were strong, therefore we launched a second phase.
accepted_answers: The results were strong, therefore we launched a second phase.
The results were strong, so we launched a second phase.
item.explanation_ar: النتيجة تحتاج therefore، مو moreover اللي معناها إضافة.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'Although the campaign runs for six weeks, but we send weekly reports.'
item.correct_answer: Although the campaign runs for six weeks, we send weekly reports.
accepted_answers: Although the campaign runs for six weeks, we send weekly reports.
item.explanation_ar: لا نجمع Although و but في الجملة نفسها — نحذف but.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the words in the correct order.

item.question: Put the words in order: writing / Following / the / I / confirm / meeting / to / am / next / our / steps
item.correct_answer: Following our meeting, I am writing to confirm the next steps.
accepted_answers: Following our meeting, I am writing to confirm the next steps.
item.explanation_ar: افتتاحية رسمية بعد الاجتماع ← Following our meeting, I am writing to confirm…
